title: Repeating Until Done - While Loops
description: Learn to repeat code while a condition is true - master conditional repetition.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let me teach you about while loops!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: While loops? How are they different from the code we've written?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Loops repeat code automatically! A while loop says: 'While this condition is True, keep doing this action.' It's like saying 'keep watering until the tank is empty.'

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So it combines repetition with conditionals?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! The loop repeats as long as the condition stays True.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: A while loop has a condition followed by a colon, with indented code below. Just like an if statement, but it repeats!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So it checks the condition, runs the code, then checks again?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! But be careful—you must change the condition inside the loop, or it runs forever!

objectives.description: Create a while loop: while condition:

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good! Remember: the loop continues while the condition is True.

phases.title: Counting with While
phases.description: Use a counter in a while loop

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's create a counting loop. Start with a counter at 0, then make a while loop that repeats while the counter is less than 3. Inside the loop, increment the counter!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Incrementing the counter makes sure the loop eventually ends?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Without it, the counter stays at its starting value forever, and the loop never stops. That's called an infinite loop!

objectives.description: Create a 'counter' variable before the loop
Add the condition to the while loop (while counter < 3:)

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: The loop repeated 3 times then stopped!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now apply it to farming! Create a while loop that automates harvesting. Use a counter to track your progress!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Harvest 5 wheat crops using a while loop! Plant them, let them grow, then use your loop to harvest them all. The loop handles the repetition for you!

objectives.description: Create a while loop for farming operations
Harvest 5 wheat crops using a while loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: The while loop automated all 5 harvests!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's the power of loops! But there's an even better loop for counted repetition—the for loop!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: Counting Loops - For Loops
